title: Nan Yar – Who am I? I Sri Ramana Maharshi I Spiritual Classic I Advaita Vedanta
author: Ramana Maharshi
description: Nan Yar – Who am I? is a classic spiritual text from one of the greatest Indian teachers, Sri Ramana Maharshi, and one of the most important books of the 20th Century. Containing the essence of his teachings, it lights the way for a clear, practical understanding and realization of spiritual awakeni
